name: El Chico Salsa Verde (Vtjs99b)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Roux (1 part cooking oil to 2 parts flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast pumpkin seeds until brown, or use pumpkin seeds called Pepitas.
2. Grind the pumpkin seeds, green chiles, and parsley very fine.
3. In a skillet with 1/4 cup cooking oil over medium heat, add a small amount of chicken stock.
4. Add the ground green chile mixture to the skillet and stir well.
5. Add the remaining chicken stock and stir until combined.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste, then cook for a few minutes on medium heat.
7. Gradually add the roux, stirring until it thickens.
8. Remove from heat and let cool. Store in the refrigerator if not using immediately. Reheat before use.
